/home/wang/ZMHT-Tool/gcc-arm-linux-gnueabi/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc CMakeFiles/tcp_server_can.dir/src/main18.c.o CMakeFiles/tcp_server_can.dir/src/ringbuffer_channels.c.o CMakeFiles/tcp_server_can.dir/src/can_frame_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/tcp_server_can.dir/src/flashcp.c.o CMakeFiles/tcp_server_can.dir/src/axican/axican.c.o -o tcp_server_can   -L/home/wang/ZMHT-Project/ZMHT-ZYNQ-地检/ZMHT-2025-PXIE-XPH/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wang/ZMHT-Project/ZMHT-ZYNQ-地检/ZMHT-2025-PXIE-XPH/lib -lpthread -lm -lrt -ldl
